title: Planning Your First Family Vacation: Where to Start
excerpt: Most families spend more time thinking about taking a trip than actually taking one. Here's exactly where to start — budget, trip type, timing, and why a travel agent changes everything.

title: Disney World vs. Universal Orlando: Which Theme Park Is Right for Your Family?
excerpt: Disney is magical. But if your kid is past the princess phase and you can only do one — Universal wins. Here's how to choose.
